title: Huawei eKitOptiX FS600D, GPON ONT Gateway, Wi-Fi 6
description: The Huawei eKitOptiX FS600D is an intelligent GPON ONT with Wi-Fi router functionality , designed for high-speed fiber connectivity in both residential and business environments The router features (1) SC/APC GPON port , (4) 1Gbit ports and dual-band Wi-Fi 6 operating simultaneously in the 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands, delivering a maximum total throughput of up to 2.98Gbps (2.4GHz 2x2 - 574Mbps, 5GHz 2x2 - 2402Mbps). Thanks to its compact design and low power consumption, it is an ideal solution for modern fiber-optic networks Device Power adapter 12V/1A
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2402 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 27 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 33 Security WEP, WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Fixed Fixed antennas 2 Antenna gain [dBi] 5, 7 Optics Transmission speed 2.488 / 1.244 Gbps Transfer type GPON Polishing type APC Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 27 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC LAN speed (4) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Max. power consumption [W] 11,7 Power via connector/terminal 12V / 1A Physical characteristics Buttons Reset, WPS, power, WiFi Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 238 Width [mm] 155 Height [mm] 35 Depth [mm] 105
